title: Reproduce Windows CLI spawn failures
description: Capture the current full-suite failure signature before changing code.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the full suite is run on Windows THEN the npx/npm ENOENT failures are recorded with affected tests and root-cause investigation starts from the failing spawn sites.
review_initial_requirements: Verify the failure is reproducible before implementation
review_regression_requirements: Ensure the fix is not scoped only to one failing test file
notes: source_issue:full npx vitest run failed with spawn npx ENOENT and spawn npm ENOENT on Windows; evidence:minimal node execFile npm/npx reproduced ENOENT; evidence:execFile npm.cmd/npx.cmd reproduced EINVAL; evidence:cmd.exe /d /s /c npm/npx succeeded; plan_created:2026-06-10

title: Add cross-platform npm/npx command resolution
description: Introduce or update a test-covered helper so child-process calls resolve npm/npx correctly on Windows while preserving POSIX behavior.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN npm or npx is spawned by tests THEN Windows uses cmd.exe wrapping and non-Windows platforms keep the original command name.
review_initial_requirements: Verify helper behavior for win32 and non-win32 command resolution
review_regression_requirements: Ensure no production CLI behavior is changed unnecessarily
notes: evidence:red test npx vitest run tests/exec-command.test.ts failed before helper existed; evidence:npx vitest run tests/exec-command.test.ts passed 3 tests; implementation:resolveExecFileCommand wraps npm/npx/.cmd/.bat through cmd.exe only on win32

title: Update CLI tests to use resolved commands
description: Wire the failing e2e and packaged CLI tests through the cross-platform command resolver.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN npx vitest run executes on Windows THEN e2e and package CLI tests launch npm/npx successfully instead of failing with ENOENT.
review_initial_requirements: Verify all affected spawn/execFile calls use the helper
review_regression_requirements: Ensure existing test intent and assertions remain intact
notes: evidence:npx vitest run tests/e2e.test.ts tests/package-cli.test.ts passed 2 files and 5 tests after wrapper/build/home fixes; evidence:rg spawn/execFile/npx/npm showed affected direct calls replaced with execCommand

title: Handle known untracked local artifacts
description: Classify the existing untracked .codex, AGENTS backup, AGENTS.md, and graphify-out artifacts without deleting user-owned state.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN the fix is complete THEN the final status clearly separates committed work from intentionally preserved local artifacts or ignored generated files.
review_initial_requirements: Verify git status before and after commits
review_regression_requirements: Ensure unrelated user or generated artifacts are not removed accidentally
notes: decision:preserve pre-existing untracked local artifacts; evidence:git ls-files graphify-out AGENTS.md .codex returned no tracked paths; evidence:git status checked before staging; no deletion or revert performed

title: Re-run validation and update graph
description: Run focused and full validation after the fix, then refresh Graphify because code changed.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN validation completes THEN full vitest, component tests, root TypeScript, component TypeScript, and graphify update evidence are recorded in this CSV.
review_initial_requirements: Verify validation covers both prior failures and Blender simulation separation
review_regression_requirements: Ensure graphify update is run after code changes per AGENTS.md
notes: evidence:npx vitest run passed 22 files and 83 tests; evidence:npx tsc -p tsconfig.json passed; evidence:npx vitest run components/blender-simulation/tests passed 10 files and 28 tests; evidence:npx tsc -p components/blender-simulation/tsconfig.json passed; evidence:graphify update . succeeded with 587 nodes and 945 edges

title: Make package build script cross-platform
description: Replace POSIX-only dist cleanup in npm build with a Node-based cleanup that works under Windows cmd and POSIX shells.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN npm run build executes through cmd.exe on Windows THEN it completes instead of failing with rm not recognized.
review_initial_requirements: Verify package CLI tests reach build and package execution
review_regression_requirements: Ensure the build command still removes stale dist output before tsc
notes: source_issue:after command wrapper fix, package CLI tests failed with 'rm' is not recognized; fix:build script now uses node fs.rmSync for dist cleanup; evidence:npx vitest run tests/e2e.test.ts tests/package-cli.test.ts passed

title: Make e2e home override and timeout Windows-safe
description: Set the Windows home environment variable for CLI child processes and give long-running e2e cases explicit Vitest timeouts.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN e2e tests run on Windows THEN global config is read from the temp home and test duration is governed by the command timeout instead of Vitest's 5s default.
review_initial_requirements: Verify LLM request assertions are exercised under child CLI runs
review_regression_requirements: Ensure the tests do not use real user config or credentials
notes: source_issue:after command wrapper fix, e2e cases hit Vitest 5000ms timeout and infer config test recorded 0 local LLM requests; fix:testHomeEnv sets HOME and USERPROFILE and e2e tests use 30000ms timeout; evidence:npx vitest run tests/e2e.test.ts tests/package-cli.test.ts passed
